Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Esh’kinaar]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Esh’kinaar is the Swarm-Queen.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 10''' — The Titan Force drove the D’Niss from the galaxy before Esh’kinaar could be summoned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 34''' — Esh’kinaar is a star-eating psychic insect that lurks in Dark Space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar is a queen of psychic insects.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar is an accomplished spellcaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar has a carapace that shimmers like spilled oil and is armed with black-diamond plates on her thorax.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar has wings made of wispy rainbows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar's gaze is like weaponized Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Esh’kinaar hovers over and slightly behind the local sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Esh’kinaar has the ability to limit magic through spell cancellation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Esh’kinaar left behind a force through her death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Esh’kinaar possesses spawn magic which is a form of conjuration used to create new versions of the D’Niss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Esh’kinaar can consume World Spirits by breaking them down and converting them into new creatures.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 6''' — Esh’kinaar is a swarm that The Last Horizon can make war against.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Esh’kinaar is an apocalyptic enemy who has brought the narrator to the brink of death.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
